headline: Waist-high on a prime SSE angle, glassy at dawn — early log session.
today: Prime angle at 5-6s giving a clean 2ft, and the dawn wind is basically light before ENE cross builds. First light is your window here — get it before the ESE turns cross-on in the afternoon. Log or fish, mellow conditions.

daysToWatch.note: Onshore SSE all day, junky and windblown despite the size bump. Not worth it.
Best day of the run: 2.8-3.5ft at good angle with light dawn winds before it goes cross-on. Early session, step up to a shortboard.
Prime angle 2ft with NNW offshore and light morning wind — clean and fun. Log it early before any afternoon E cross.
